sections.paragraph:
σαλπίζω
Etym. Deriv. uncertain.

to sound the trumpet, give signal by trumpet, Xen.: c. acc. cogn., σα. ρυθμούς Xen.; cf. ἀνακλητικός: metaph., ἀμφὶ δὲ σάλπιγξεν οὐρανός heaven trumpeted around, of thunder as if a signal for battle, Il.:—impers., ἐπεὶ ἐσάλπιγξε (sc. ὁ σαλπιγκτής) when the trumpet sounded, Xen.
